# Sugam Child & Gastro Care Clinic

> Pediatric, neonatal and pediatric gastroenterology clinic in Venkittapuram, Ambethkar Road, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641025, India. Led by experienced pediatricians and a pediatric gastroenterologist / interventional endoscopist. Services include newborn care, child vaccination (IAP schedule), jaundice treatment, stomach pain & acid reflux care, liver/hepatology care, endoscopy and ERCP.

## Contact
- Phone: +91 73582 93645
- Email: sugamgastrochildclinic@gmail.com
- Address: 2/278, Dr Ambedkar Rd, near Sindhi Vidyalaya, Bhuvaneshwari Nagar, Venkittapuram, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641025, India
- Hours: Mon–Sat, 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM and 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

## Pages
- [Home](https://sugamgastrochildclinic.com): Clinic overview, doctors, appointment booking.
- [Services](https://sugamgastrochildclinic.com/services): Pediatric consultation, neonatology, pediatric gastroenterology, liver care, vaccination, nutrition counseling.
- [Blog](https://sugamgastrochildclinic.com/blogs): Doctor-written child health advice — newborn care, vaccination, jaundice, acid reflux, nutrition.
- [Gallery](https://sugamgastrochildclinic.com/gallery): Clinic facilities and care team.

## Doctors
- Dr. B. Rajesh Kannan — Pediatrician & Neonatologist.
- Dr. A. Senthil Vadivu — Consultant Gastroenterologist, Hepatologist, Interventional Endoscopist & Paediatric Gastroenterologist. M.D. (Paediatrics), D.M. (Medical Gastroenterology).
